description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, pastel blue exterior, adorned with small, multicolored spherical sprinkles around the lower sides. The top surface features six evenly spaced dollops of white whipped cream, arranged in a circular pattern. At the center, there are two bright red cherries with stems, serving as a focal decorative element. The cake sits on a white, slightly raised cake stand with a subtle embossed pattern along the rim. The overall appearance is clean and elegant, with a minimalist yet festive style. The cake's surface is matte and soft, suggesting a fondant or smooth buttercream finish.
description: A round, pastel blue cake with white whipped cream dollops, two red cherries on top, and multicolored sprinkles, displayed on a white cake stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cake's blue surface, five visible whipped cream dollops, two red cherries at the center, and the cake stand's decorative rim.
description_view_1: Rotated view highlighting the cherries and whipped cream dollops, with the sprinkles and cake stand edge visible.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the arrangement of whipped cream dollops and cherries, and the even distribution of sprinkles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the same decorative elements with a slightly different angle on the cherries and cream dollops.
